name: sast-pathtraversal
description: Detect path traversal vulnerabilities in a codebase using a three-phase approach: recon (find file-loading sinks with dynamic paths), batched verify (trace user input and mitigations in parallel subagents, 3 sinks each), and merge (consolidate batch results). Requires sast/architecture.md (run sast-analysis first). Outputs findings to sast/pathtraversal-results.md. Use when asked to find path traversal, directory traversal, or file disclosure bugs.
